steps.name: Launch browser
Fixture "browser"
Create context
Fixture "context"
Create page
Fixture "page"
Navigate to "/"
Expect "toHaveURL"
Launch Amazon
Before Hooks
Fill "Laptop" locator('[role=\'searchbox\']')
Click locator('[value=\'Go\']')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[id*=\'brandsRefine\'] a[aria-label*=\'HP\'] i')
Check locator('[id*=\'brandsRefine\'] a[aria-label*=\'HP\'] i')
Expect "toBeChecked" locator('[id*=\'brandsRefine\'] a[aria-label*=\'HP\'] i')
Click locator('[id*=\'priceRefine\'] a span').nth(1)
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('//span[text()=\'Sort by:\']')
Click locator('//span[text()=\'Sort by:\']')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('//li/a[text()=\'Price: Low to High\']')
Click locator('//li/a[text()=\'Price: Low to High\']')
Wait for selector locator('[class*=\'top-small\'] h2:not([aria-label*=\'Sponsored\']) span').first()
Query count locator('[class*=\'top-small\'] h2:not([aria-label*=\'Sponsored\']) span')
